name: Minnie and Aunt Pete's Yeast Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut shortening into flour, salt, and sugar.
2. Dissolve yeast in warm water and add to the flour mixture, then add egg whites.
3. Mix together until a smooth, elastic dough forms. Knead gently, adding only enough flour to prevent sticking.
4. Let the dough rise for 1-1/2 hours, or until doubled in size.
5. Punch down the dough and roll out on a lightly floured surface.
6. Shape into rolls and place them in greased muffin tins.
7. Let rise again until doubled in size.
8. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) for 10 to 12 minutes, or until brown.
NOTE: These rolls can also be frozen on cookie sheets and placed in zip-loc freezer bags for up to 4 weeks after shaping before the second rising. Take them out of the freezer at least 3 hours before baking, place them in a greased pan, let thaw and rise until doubled in size.
